title: OpenAPI
description: OpenAPI documents overview material for OpenAPI in the protocol domain. It is classified as a specification page for the api-spec class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights V3, Data Type, string, and array, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include protocol, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is protocol / openapi / overview, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
